name: Chocolate Chip Bundt Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a bundt pan.
3. Measure all ingredients for the cake in a large bowl. Blend on low speed for 1/2 minute, scraping constantly. Beat on high speed for 3 minutes, scraping occasionally.
4. Pour batter into the prepared pan.
5. Bake for 40-45 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Cool.
6. Topping: Heat chocolate chips and butter in a small saucepan over low heat, stirring constantly until chocolate is melted. Allow to cool slightly before spreading on the cake.
WARNING: Ensure all cooking processes are completed safely.
